contents: What is sexy? While a question should be answered by your own personalites and aesthetic. Women suppose to have equal rights, including the right to show their sexy. Additionally, I do not agree with this editor's opinion. You told us that the sexist and male dominant will buy those ideas. While I will say that only extreme feminist and the social section who desires to follow the mainstream would like to buy your idea. It is a shame that you grade yourself as the awakened one. However, overall, you are just the one who are jumping and peeking around. I give my apology if I offended you, but that's it, please do not use your superficial ideas to disorient your audiences. I am really sick about your subjective and unreasonable prejudices to males. Blaming each other will not be able to form a real equal society.
